title: Harder Netherite
description: A mod that adds one just item that will make getting netherite way harder and more annoying
body:
# Harder Netherite!
This is a super simple mod that adds just one item: **the netherite nugget**
# What it does
The mod makes it way harder to obtain a netherite ingot, and to repair your netherite gear

![carft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91ba734babda462254823144eb3a842237b08c2.png)

Now istead of getting a full ingot, you get a **single nugget** which you need **9** of them craft an ingot

![craftv2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65bb10b8bd7a170b9b5f44c0bfcf532f8435237f.png)

![domparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe2a009e7cb80cfd74c26ef99fa84a04a3d4a41b.png)
So for comparison, with the mod you will need to mine an absurd **36** ancient debris, instead of the normal **4** (have fun mining allthat)

![changeback](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd5c70ce011fdb122adab3d9b796f393f69cda7.png)

You can also convert an ingot back to normal, just like iron or gold!

### Feel free to use in any modpack you want!
